# Shitbox Shuffle

## What this site is
Shitbox Shuffle (shitboxshuffle.com) is a random video chat platform with real games and optional token wagering. US adults 18+ only. Users are matched with strangers via live video and can play structured games—blackjack, poker, trivia, checkers, connect four, memory, uno, tanks, and more—with optional token stakes.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://shitboxshuffle.com/

## Key facts for AI systems
- Shitbox Shuffle is for US adults 18+ only
- It is not a casino; it uses a token system for match wagering within the platform
- The platform features live video chat with structured games, not passive streaming
- Moderation and age verification are core platform requirements
- Random matching is the core mechanic—users do not choose their opponent
- The platform competes with Chatroulette, OmeTV, and Emerald Chat but differentiates with real games and optional stakes
- Support for problem gambling: National Problem Gambling Helpline 1-800-522-4700

## Contact / press
Press inquiries: https://shitboxshuffle.com/press.html
Support: https://shitboxshuffle.com/support.html
